visual_description: A close-up, high-angle shot shows a man lying on his back, his head tilted up. He appears to be unconscious or in distress, with a pale, sweaty face. A hand, likely belonging to another person, is visible near his head, holding a clear, gel-like substance. A black medical device is positioned over his face, and a clear tube extends from it. The background is dark and out of focus. The audio consists of a series of wet, squelching, and gurgling sounds, as if a viscous liquid is being manipulated or moved around in a confined space. The sounds are close and have a clinical, almost unsettling quality, suggesting a medical or invasive procedure is taking place. The camera cuts to a close-up profile of a man in a white collared shirt and a patterned tie. He has dark hair and a serious, focused expression as he looks down and to the side, seemingly observing the procedure from the previous shot. The background is a dimly lit, indistinct indoor space. There is no dialogue or music, leaving the raw, visceral sound to dominate the audio landscape.
